---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to Soft-UE.

## 🎯 Use Case
Describe the specific problem this feature would solve or the capability it would enable:

### Current Workaround
[If applicable, describe how you currently work around this limitation]

### Expected Benefits
[What benefits would this feature provide?]

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution in detail:

### Technical Approach
[How do you envision this being implemented?]

### API Design
[If this involves API changes, please propose the interface]

### Configuration Options
[What configuration parameters would be needed?]

## 📊 Performance Impact
If this is a performance-related feature:

### Expected Performance Improvements
- [e.g., Reduce latency by X%]
- [e.g., Increase throughput by X Gbps]
- [e.g., Reduce memory usage by X%]

### Benchmarking Approach
[How would you measure the improvement?]

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered:

### Why this approach is preferred:
[Explain why your proposed solution is better]

### Other approaches:
[List other approaches and why they weren't chosen]

## 🏗️ Implementation Details

### Files that would need modification:
- [ ] `src/soft-ue/model/ses/` - SES layer components
- [ ] `src/soft-ue/model/pds/` - PDS layer components
- [ ] `src/soft-ue/model/pdc/` - PDC layer components
- [ ] `src/soft-ue/helper/` - Helper classes
- [ ] `src/soft-ue/test/` - Test cases
- [ ] `examples/` - Example programs
- [ ] `doc/` - Documentation

### Estimated Effort:
- [ ] Small (1-2 days)
- [ ] Medium (1 week)
- [ ] Large (2-3 weeks)
- [ ] Major (1+ months)

### Dependencies:
[Are there any dependencies on other components or external libraries?]

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
Define what success looks like for this feature:

### Functional Requirements:
- [ ] [Specific functional requirement 1]
- [ ] [Specific functional requirement 2]
- [ ] [Specific functional requirement 3]

### Performance Requirements:
- [ ] [Specific performance requirement 1]
- [ ] [Specific performance requirement 2]

### Quality Requirements:
- [ ] Test coverage > 80%
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained

## 🧪 Testing Strategy

### Unit Tests Required:
- [ ] Test specific functionality
- [ ] Test edge cases
- [ ] Test error conditions

### Integration Tests Required:
- [ ] Test with existing components
- [ ] Test with various configurations
- [ ] Test performance impact

### Example Programs:
- [ ] Update existing examples
- [ ] Create new demonstration example

## 📚 Documentation Required

### Code Documentation:
- [ ] Doxygen comments for new APIs
- [ ] Inline code comments

### User Documentation:
- [ ] Update README.md
- [ ] Update user guide
- [ ] Add example to examples/README.md

### API Documentation:
- [ ] Update API reference
- [ ] Add configuration documentation

## 🎯 Priority Assessment

### Impact on Users:
- [ ] High - affects many users
- [ ] Medium - affects some users
- [ ] Low - affects few users

### Implementation Complexity:
- [ ] Low - straightforward implementation
- [ ] Medium - moderate complexity
- [ ] High - complex implementation

### Timeline Preference:
- [ ] High priority - next release
- [ ] Medium priority - upcoming release
- [ ] Low priority - future consideration

## 👥 Collaboration

### Willing to Contribute:
- [ ] Yes, I can help implement this
- [ ] Yes, I can provide guidance
- [ ] No, but I can test and review

### Seeking Contributors:
- [ ] Looking for implementation help
- [ ] Looking for testing help
- [ ] Looking for documentation help

## 🏷️ Suggested Labels
- `enhancement`
- `good first issue` (if suitable for new contributors)
- `help wanted` (if you need help implementing)
- `performance` (if performance-related)
- `documentation` (if documentation is the main need)

## 🔗 Related Issues
- [ ] Related: #[issue number]
- [ ] Depends on: #[issue number]
- [ ] Blocks: #[issue number]

---

**Thank you for contributing to Soft-UE's development!** 💡

## 📝 Additional Notes
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
